op.text: [2025-09-20] Priya received the arts-infrastructure grant for her ceramics studio buildout; the full amount was awarded, covering deposit and buildout; she signs the lease next month. Dana and Priya built the application together at Priya's kitchen table in June 2025. When Priya called with the news, both cried; Dana said: 'I don't think I've ever been so happy about something that has nothing to do with my own life.' Priya asked Dana if she wants a shelf in the new studio for Dana's ceramics work; Dana said yes immediately. Dana described this as 'medicine' after 'the four-second-verdict spring.' (2025-09-20)
[as of 2025-09-20] Nina (Marcus and Elena's daughter, born 2025-03-06) is crawling as of September 2025; Marcus sends videos frequently; Dana described her as 'a menace' affectionately

[as of 2025-09-20] Dana and Sam took the Dorothy Jean out twice more during summer 2025 after the July 12 launch; described the summer sailing as 'lovely quiet' and 'nothing dramatic, exactly the point'

[as of 2025-09-20] Sam's remote work arrangement with Austin robotics startup is working well; his team likes him; he is flying to Austin the week after 2025-09-20 for his regular every-couple-months in-person visit
